calendar.matters:
Minor'S Compromise In Scd 218 At 09:00 Am On December 30, 2002.
Off Calendar Dec-30-2002 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for hearing this day.
Appearances: Erik Peterson, Esq. appearing for plaintiff David Chen
David Chen, father appearing on behalf of himself and his children is sworn and examined. After hearing the evidence, the Court grants the petition for minor's compromise as follows:
From the $ 555,000.00 award, the father David Chen is to receive $200,000.00; of the remaining $350.000.00 it shall devide equaly between the three minors, with each minor to receive $111,666.66 minus $4,898.62 in costs per child and $27,942.01 in attorneys fees per child for a net deposit of $83,826.03 per child to be placed in a blocked account until the child reaches the age of eighteen. Counsel for the plaintiff shall prepare an order for the court.
Commissioner: Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: R.Goulding; Reporter A. Duffy CSR# 12599;
